title: aita for "snitching"?
text: tl:dr i a (13)m was bullied by a classmate, am i a asshole for telling the teacher about his behaviour? so yesterday i was just at school for the last 40 minutes and a kid named steve (fake name) came up to me and the conversation went like this me: what do you want steve: your a fat ass pig me: dude go fuck off steve: you and your family can go die and get fucked to death by me me: ...... steve: you live in a shitty house with hobos (uh no i don't) me: hey at least i'm not a dumpster (trying my best not to cry) steve's friend: hey you fucking fatass leave steve alone, at least he isn't retarded like you me: *starts to cry a bit* steve and his friend: oh look at cry baby over here wah wah wah so then after class i talked to my teacher about what happened with steve and he said after the long weekend he will talk to him, so i told some of my friends and some of them agreed with me telling the teacher, some others said that since i am a snitch i will get stiches so reddit am i the asshole?

storyboard.content: I'm a 13-year-old boy at school. I was just going about the last 40 minutes of my school day.
A classmate named Steve came up to me unprovoked and called me a 'fat ass pig.' He then told me that me and my family can 'go die' and made violent threats.
Steve continued insulting me, saying I live in a 'shitty house with hobos.' His friend also joined in, calling me a 'fucking fatass' and 'retarded.'
I started to cry. Steve and his friend mocked me for crying, saying 'oh look at cry baby over here, wah wah wah.'
After class, I talked to my teacher about what happened with Steve. The teacher said he would talk to Steve after the long weekend.
I told some friends. Some agreed I was right to tell the teacher, but others said since I'm a snitch, I'll 'get stitches.'
